name: Crescent Roll Kolack by Alice
recipeInstructions:
1. Preparing the Filling
a. To make 4 large Kolacks: Divide each can of Crescent Rolls into two pieces; roll out, incorporating filling, and then roll.
b. To make 8 small Kolaches: Divide each can into four pieces; roll out, incorporate filling, and then roll.
2. Preparing the Filling
a. In a separate bowl, combine 1/2 cup water and 1/3 cup sugar to create a syrup. Boil for one minute.
b. Allow the mixture to cool before adding chopped walnuts, lemon rind, and 1 tablespoon of butter.
3. Baking
Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30-35 minutes.
